function.name: searchAutonomousTaskArtifacts
function.description: Search ATM autonomous-task original writings, poems, essays, notes, and execution artifacts previously created by Selena. Also use for 中文场景 like 原文、全文、诗歌、随笔、笔记、念给我听、把你写的给我看 when the user wants the actual text instead of a summary.

Query.description: Optional keyword query for the desired artifact, such as a topic, title hint, or writing type like poem / essay / note / 指挥 / 夜曲.

Limit.description: Maximum number of matching tasks to return (1-20). Default 5.

SinceDate.description: Optional lower bound date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

UntilDate.description: Optional upper bound date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

IncludeIncomplete.description: Whether to include unfinished tasks. Default false.
